# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "appName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_S1"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'default')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]-plan",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S1"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]-blob",
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containerTypes",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]-appsettings",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "WEBSITE_LOAD_CERTIFICATES": "*"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]-firewall",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/firewalls",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('databaseName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]-networking",
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/networkAcls",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "defaultAction": "Allow"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]-connectionstrings",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "apiVersion": "2021-08-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ConnectionStrings": {
          "DBConnectionString": {
            "value": "[concat('Server=tcp:', resourceGroup().name, '.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=;', parameters('appName'), '_sqladmin;Password=;', parameters('appName'), '_sqlpassword;MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True')]"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
